/CAL:UPDATE TO CTS REPORT/DEF:WAS SENTENCED TO 3Y SP ON A PAPER COMMITMENTON 03-04-20, THE MATTER WAS PUT OVER TO 03-30-20 FOR UPDATE AND SUBSEQUENTLY CONTINUED TO THIS DATE,/X:THE SFSD CALCULATES A TOTAL OF 10 MILESTONE CREDITS EARNED BY DEFENDANT,EQUIVALENT TO 70 DAYS CTS,/CTORD:THAT DEFENDANTBE CREDITED WITH AN ADDITIONAL 70 DAYS CTS BRINGING HIS OVERALL TOTAL TO 1,432 DAYS OF CUSTODY CREDIT,/
